summary: Comprehensive testing of digital queue management application completed. Backend APIs and frontend integration tested extensively with excellent results.

minor_issues.issue: Second admin account (admin2/admin123) returns 520 server error
minor_issues.impact: Second admin cannot login, but primary admin1 works fine
minor_issues.details: First admin (admin1/admin123) works perfectly, but admin2 gets 520 error suggesting server-side issue

passed_tests: GET /api/shops returns 2 seeded shops correctly
POST /api/tokens/generate creates tokens with correct fields (token_number, estimated_wait_minutes, tokens_ahead)
GET /api/tokens/{token_id}/status returns accurate token status with queue position
GET /api/shops/{shop_id}/counter returns complete counter information
POST /api/admin/login with admin1/admin123 returns valid JWT token
POST /api/admin/next successfully advances queue and updates serving token
POST /api/admin/skip/{token_id} skips tokens correctly
POST /api/admin/serve/{token_id} marks tokens as served
POST /api/admin/reset successfully resets queue to empty state
Homepage loads with functional shop selector and navigation buttons
Join Queue page accepts user input and generates tokens successfully
Token generation flow works end-to-end (select shop → fill form → generate → view status)
Live Counter page displays real-time queue information
Admin login flow works with admin1/admin123 credentials
Admin dashboard displays queue status and management controls
Admin dashboard Next Token button advances queue properly
Admin dashboard skip and serve actions work on queue items
Admin dashboard Reset Queue with confirmation dialog functions correctly
All frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Integration between frontend and backend APIs working seamlessly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issue: Second admin account (admin2/admin123) login fails with 520 server error. First admin works fine, so this appears to be a server-side issue rather than authentication logic. Could investigate database seeding or server configuration for second admin.
